The Invitation (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,100,080Details
International Box Office $12,935,746
Worldwide Box Office $38,035,826
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $414,710
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $278,522
Total $693,232
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After the death of her mother and having no other known relatives, Evie takes a DNA test…and discovers a long-lost cousin she never knew she had. Invited by her newfound family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, she’s at first seduced by the sexy aristocrat host but is soon thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets in her family’s history and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,805,468 (27.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,114 opening theaters/3,117 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,508,729

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 26th, 2022 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 16th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
August 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Pozvánka do pekla (Czech Republic)
August 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as The Bride (Germany)
August 25th, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
August 26th, 2022 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: October 18th, 2022 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, violent content, some strong language, sexual content and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2745 (cert #53640), 8/17/2022)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Plot point: Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Vampire
Subgenre: Gothic Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After the death of her mother and having no other known relatives, Evie takes a DNA test…and discovers a long-lost cousin she never knew she had. Invited by her newfound family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, she’s at first seduced by the sexy aristocrat host but is soon thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets in her family’s history and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.
